summary: GAIA iteration 5 tested end-to-end. Backend unit suite (test_daily 33 + test_pick_excerpt 21 + test_testimonial_variant 10 + test_story_variant 8 = 72/72) all pass. New HTTP-level API suite (test_daily_api.py, 20 tests) against the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL also passes 20/20 — covers /api/daily layering (sign+rising+moon, EN/FR, 6-band mapping 3→night, 6→dawn, 10→morning, 13→midday, 16→afternoon, 19→evening, 22→night, hour-range 422 on 24/-1/100) and /api/daily/deep (EN hour=10 → 3 paragraphs, FR hour=19 containing crépuscule/soir/seuil, 422 on hour=25/-3/100, 422 on iso_date='bad-date'). Frontend mobile (390×844) verified: daily-layer-sign / daily-layer-rising / daily-layer-moon all render on load; generate-daily-deep POSTs {lang, hour} to /api/daily/deep (confirmed via fetch intercept); daily-deep-text appears after Claude call (~15-20s) as a single React Native <Text> whose content string contains the full poetic response (note: source splits on blank lines but in DOM it serialises as one text block — paragraphs preserved inside the string); button disappears after generation; EN→FR language-toggle click correctly clears daily-deep-text, restores the Weave button, and re-renders Rising=Aube / Le Seuil de l'Éveil and Moon=Lune Gibbeuse Croissante / La Presque-Pleine. Current moon phase today is waxing_gibbous ('The Near-Ripe') as expected. Success: backend 100% (92/92), frontend 100% on critical flows.

issues: In /app/frontend/app/index.tsx the rising sub-label uses `lang === 'fr' ? 'Rising — ' : 'Rising — '` — BOTH branches are identical English 'Rising'. In French mode the UI shows 'RISING — AUBE' instead of something like 'LEVER — AUBE' or 'SEUIL — AUBE'. Cosmetic i18n oversight; core functionality works.
Typo: 'Sois plainement qui tu es' → should be 'Sois pleinement qui tu es' (French 'fully' is 'pleinement', not 'plainement').

action_items: (Optional polish) In /app/frontend/app/index.tsx line ~177, change the French branch of the Rising sub-label to a French word (e.g. 'Lever — ' or 'Seuil — ') so the label is fully localised.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~460 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold but still manageable. Daily logic is already extracted into daily.py (good).
All endpoints under /api prefix. Pydantic validators correctly enforce hour 0-23 and iso_date YYYY-MM-DD; 422 paths verified.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is read once at import time (os.environ['EMERGENT_LLM_KEY']) — fails fast if missing, correct.
Frontend correctly uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL and all interactive elements have testIDs.
seed_data_creation: None. No DB seeds required for daily/deep endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-5 daily-enrichment flows are green. Two cosmetic nits remain (French 'Rising —' sub-label and 'plainement'→'pleinement' typo) — non-blocking. For retest, re-run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_daily.py /app/backend/tests/test_daily_api.py` with EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL exported. The /api/daily/deep call takes ~15-20s (Claude sonnet-4-5) — use timeout>=45s. Lang toggle testID is 'language-toggle' (not 'lang-toggle').
